status_detail: BREAKTHROUGH PARTIAL. v5 (credentials-first reorder ONLY) fixes BOTH prior regressions: (a) v3 empty-ACAC HPACK bug -- now Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true is transmitted correctly; (b) v4 ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR -- gone, response delivered cleanly with 4 parseable headers. Response headers visible: Access-Control-Allow-Credentials, Cache-Control, Content-Type, X-Content-Type-Options. HOWEVER warning still doesn't render -- next layer exposed: NEW console error 'Access to fetch at https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation from origin https://gamma.app has been blocked by CORS policy: No Access-Control-Allow-Origin header is present on the requested resource.' Engine sets ACAC=true but does not emit ACAO echoing request Origin (https://gamma.app), which is mandatory under credentials-mode CORS. Page outline shows '1' placeholder only.
request_status: 200 OK h2 at HTTP layer; Status column shows 'CORS error' badge; fetch labeled (failed) by browser
acac_value: Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true (correctly transmitted, no longer empty)
cors_error_verbatim: Access to fetch at 'https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation' from origin 'https://gamma.app' has been blocked by CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present on the requested resource.
regression_vs_v4: better -- no HTTP/2 PROTOCOL_ERROR, response delivered cleanly with 4 parseable headers
progress_vs_v3: better -- ACAC value transmitted as 'true' instead of empty string. The empty-ACAC HPACK bug is cured by the credentials-first reorder alone.
root_cause_hypothesis: v5 reorder confirmed to fix HPACK encoding of ACAC value (now 'true') AND avoid v4 frame-corruption regression. But the warning response generator only sets ACAC; it does not also emit Access-Control-Allow-Origin to echo the request Origin (https://gamma.app), which is MANDATORY under credentials-mode CORS.
recommendation_for_dev: v6 priority A: keep v5's credentials-first reorder, additionally inject Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://gamma.app (echo request Origin -- NOT '*' because credentials: 'include' forbids wildcard).
v6 must NOT re-introduce Vary or Expose-Headers from v4 (those caused HPACK regression).
After v6, expect either: SUCCESS (warning renders) or PARTIAL (envelope schema/SSE issue surfaces as next layer).
Lesson: minimal change wins. v4 added 3 things at once (reorder + Vary + Expose) and broke. v5 isolated the reorder and proved it works.
errors_observed: Console: Access to fetch at 'https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/generation' from origin 'https://gamma.app' has been blocked by CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present on the requested resource.
Network panel: Status column 'CORS error' badge
Page outline: '1' placeholder only (no warning text)
notes: Cycle 95 R-5 -- gamma minimal reorder verify. PARTIAL with breakthrough: v3 empty-ACAC + v4 HPACK regression both cured by isolated credentials-first reorder. Next layer (missing ACAO) is now the only blocker. Subagent 6m, exceeded 5min soft, within 8min hard.
